text: Last class you described your home and the rooms inside.
Now look outside. What is the weather like today?
Sunny

What is the weather like? It is sunny.
It is cold today, so I wear a coat.
It is rainy, so I take my umbrella.
Is it hot in summer? Yes, it is.
Good morning, Gabriela. What is the weather like today?
It is cloudy and cold this morning. I think it is going to rain.
Then take your umbrella. Is it very cold outside?
Yes, it is cold, so I wear my warm coat today.
Good idea. What is the weather like tomorrow?
Tomorrow it is sunny and hot. No coat, no umbrella!
What is the weather like today?
It is sunny and hot today.
It is cold, so I wear a coat.
Is it cold outside?

Hello, I am Gabriela, and I want to tell you about the weather in São Paulo. In spring it is often sunny and warm, and I love to walk in the park. In summer it is very hot, and sometimes it is rainy in the afternoon, so I always take my umbrella. In autumn the sky is cloudy and grey, and the air is windy and cool. In winter it is cold in the morning, so I wear a warm coat. My favorite season is spring, because it is bright and sunny. What is the weather like where you are today?

Hi Gabriela, this is Daniel with a quick weather report for your trip. Today it is sunny and hot, so wear light clothes and bring water. Tomorrow it is windy in the morning and cloudy in the afternoon. On Wednesday it is rainy all day, so take your umbrella. On Thursday it is cold and grey, and you need a warm coat. On Friday the sun comes back and it is bright and warm again. Have a wonderful trip, and check the weather every morning.

Rainy

It is sunny today.
It is rainy, so I take my umbrella.
What is the weather like?
In summer it is very hot.
It is cold, so I wear a coat.
What is the weather like today?
It is sunny and hot today.
Is it cold outside?
